title: Project: Havoc Craft
description: Project: Havoc Craft: The ULTIMATE vanilla+ modpack.
body:
![header_title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f8e8fafd9d962712b3050b6acfe35edb5d93edb.png) # » Introducing, Project: Havoc Craft! Primarily focusing on the adventure and combat aspect of gameplay, **Project: Havoc Craft** is the ULTIMATE vanilla-enhancing modpack, featuring over 300+ mods to provide an incredible gameplay experience!
IMPORTANT! ![header_important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/490efc22684bc3114152773351472dec785542a8.png) # » IMPORTANT! ### • Updating Mods ↓ If mods need to be updated, please do **NOT** update them until a new version of Project: Havoc Craft releases, as updating a dependency of a mod without an update to the mod itself _(or vice versa)_ can cause the game to crash. Updating many of those mods without testing can cause so many issues. I know because I've been there, **multiple times**. ### • (DISABLED AS OF V1.0.0) Custom GUI ↓ Because of the custom in-game user interface released in **[v1.0.1 Beta](https://modrinth.com/modpack/havoccraft/changelog)**, it is highly recommended to play in full screen/windowed borderless, as the new UI will break if not played in said aspect ratio. ### • Configs ↓ I highly recommend using the config files given to you when downloading the modpack, as all mods have been tweaked to work seamlessly with each other. Many mods have been balanced as well. When it comes to GUI-based mods & game rules, those **are okay** to change. But when it comes to mods that add structures, change mob's variables, etc, do **NOT** change them. _Unless you really want to. I can't stop you._ # » Recommendations Here are some additions I recommend to further spice up your gameplay! _(These mods were originally included in the modpack, but for legal reasons, removed. **So download them!**)_ - **Mods:** [Distant Horizons 2.0](https://discord.gg/invite/xAB8G4cENx) **|** [Epic Knights](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-knights-armor-and-weapons/files/5254841) **|** [Epic Knights: Addon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-knights-addon/files/5193351) - **Shaderpacks:** [Complementary: Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) **|** [Rethinking Voxels](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels) - **Resource Packs:** [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) **|** [Jerm's Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/jerms-better-leaves) # » Q&A Nothing, at the moment!
Features ![header_features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ca0602a19170606a5278654412914f3fd6e2624.png) This modpack strikes an amazing balance of exploration and creativity by offering the perfect amount of content without complicating the survival experience. It introduces game-enriching features, whilst staying true to the vanilla playstyle. This modpack currently adds... **↓** - **300+ mods!** - **A complete structure & terrain generation overhaul!** - **Visual & audio overhaul!** - **Plenty of QoL improvements & additions!** - **Complete multiplayer support!** - **Revamped in-game user interface!** - **Countless performance mods!** - **And so, so much more!**
About ![header_about](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d366c294cda936b059cc74c325e5e5d44324e5f.png) # » About Project: Havoc Craft Back in August 2019, I got huge into Minecraft modding. I had a modpack called "Project: Havoc Craft," just like this one, based on the up-and-coming hardcore-based modpack, **[RL Craft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/rlcraft)**, right before its big boom in popularity. In March 2021, I took the project down, due to a lack of consistency & motivation. As of late January of this year, I started a much better-made & maintained version of Project: Havoc Craft. # » About Me My name is Joey _(otherwise known as Havoc)_ and I'm 18 years old. I have a major interest in graphic & video design, as well as photography. I'm huge into Sandbox games and play them when I can. I've been fidgeting around with Modded Minecraft for about 5 years and finally decided to release my first modpack publically. _I'll write a lil' bit more later..._ # » Personal Links - Check out my **[YouTube Channel](https://www.youtube.com/c/Hqvxcc)** for all sorts of content! *(Streams, gaming, reactions, etc!)* - Check out my **[WIP Discord Server](https://discord.gg/WfxSEvFR3R)** for upcoming news on the modpack! - Check out my **[Linktree](https://linktr.ee/j.aurience)** that has all of my personal socials, as well as other non-Minecraft-related projects I work on!
